features: Unique polishing propellers that helps remove stains
Helps reveal natural whiteness of your teeth
It has a wide thumb grip and a rubber handle for better control and comfort
description: Product Description Colgate MaxFresh medium toothbrush - Pack of 12 Colgate MaxFresh manual toothbrush is designed with a tongue Freshener and multi-height bristles to power away odour-causing bacteria and plaque. It has a wide thumb grip and a rubber handle for better control and comfort. Experience a whole new dimension of freshness with Colgate MaxFresh! The Colgate Max Fresh refreshing tongue cleaner on the back of the brush head removes the bacteria responsible for bad breath. The crossed bristles of different lengths clean thoroughly between the teeth and remove bacteria and plaque. Directions 1. Wet the toothbrush bristles. 2. Apply toothpaste to the bristles. 3. Place the toothbrush in the mouth, against the teeth, at a 45-degree angle. 4. Brush gently in a circular motion. 5. Brush the outer surfaces, inner surfaces, and chewing surfaces of all teeth. 6. Brush the tongue to remove bacteria and freshen breath. 7. Rinse the toothbrush thoroughly after use. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children under 3 years old. This product may pose a choking hazard if swallowed. See more
